animations.name: Soft Blink Dot
animations.description: The tiny template icon holds still while the negative-space eye softly closes to a narrow slit and opens again.

animations.name: Quick Thinking Wobble
animations.description: Makes a quick centered thinking wobble with tiny left-right rotations, then settles back to neutral.

animations.name: Side Glance Nudge
animations.description: Nudges left, pauses, nudges right, and returns center like the tiny icon is checking whether progress has arrived.

animations.name: Happy Pop
animations.description: Pops upward with a tiny squash-and-stretch beat, overshoots, and settles cleanly back to center.

animations.name: Sharp Shake
animations.description: Snaps through a fast horizontal error shake with tiny opposing tilts, then locks back to center.

animations.description: Kuramon gently floats up and down while his horns and tentacles sway in parallax, looking around lazily.
animations.name: Breathing Float
Thunder Pulse Cannon
animations.description: Prepares a massive pulse beam while swelling, suddenly strikes with thunder, then blasts three intense cannon flashes with heavy recoil.

Turns flushed pink-red while scooting left, braking hard, then scooting right like he is pacing in a tiny loop, with the eye leading each turn and the bottom tentacles scrambling underneath in offset steps.
animations.name: Pacing Scoot
Triumphant Flag Wave
animations.description: Kuramon pops up, suddenly holding a victory flag, waving it vigorously back and forth while bouncing, ending with a celebratory spin before putting it away.

animations.name: Party Hat Celebration
animations.description: A party hat drops on Kuramon's head. He performs a happy left-right dance tapping his tentacles, before removing the hat and settling.

animations.name: Gold Medal Drop
animations.description: A large gold medal lands on Kuramon. The weight squashes him down, but he proudly puffs up, swaying left and right heroically, then tosses it aside.

animations.description: Spins completely around in a startled error reaction, preserving the 4 body spikes throughout the 360 rotation.
animations.name: Error Turnaround
